title: Optimizing Fibonacci Sequence Generation
scenario: Generate a Python function that efficiently computes the nth Fibonacci number using memoization, with clear comments explaining the approach. The function should accept an integer n as input and return the corresponding Fibonacci number. The output should be a code snippet, formatted according to standard Python conventions.
constraints: Must be under 50 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the Python code snippet is syntactically correct, following standard Python conventions.
Check whether the generated code meets the specified constraints (line count and memoization usage).
Evaluate the time complexity of the generated code, ensuring it adheres to the expected O(n) efficiency for large inputs.
Assess the code's readability and maintainability, considering comment quality, variable naming, and overall structure.
